parsed_output.justification: Jordan2 claims to be the Robber and states he swapped cards with Haak (Line 53). However, he later claims he knows Meryl is the Seer because he 'looked at her' (Line 147). Since the Robber only looks at the card they swap with, it is logically impossible for him to have swapped with Haak and also looked at Meryl's card. This internal contradiction, combined with his attempt to protect Meryl (whose claim is contradicted by Haak), strongly suggests Jordan2 is a Werewolf.
